text.title: Embedding Applications Failure Modes
text.summary: 6 antipatterns observed across embedding-pipeline deployments. Each pairs detector + fix.

antipattern.symptom: Top-MTEB model deployed; production Recall@10 underperforms baseline by 10–15 pp.
antipattern.root-cause: Aggregate rank reflects 56 tasks; retrieval rank can differ >20 positions.
antipattern.fix: Always rank candidates by `MTEB.retrieval.<corpus_class>` score before domain bench.

antipattern.symptom: Cohere v3 NDCG 5–15% lower than expected.
antipattern.fix: Index: `input_type='search_document'`. Query: `input_type='search_query'`. Validate at call time, not deploy.

antipattern.symptom: Production search returns stale or wrong-distance results without error.
antipattern.root-cause: Collection dimension or metric changed after ingestion; silent.
antipattern.fix: Before any upsert, fetch collection config; assert dimension + metric match config; fail loudly.

antipattern.symptom: Embedding represents only first N tokens; recall on long docs degrades.
antipattern.root-cause: Some providers silently truncate at token limit.
antipattern.fix: Pre-tokenize + chunk before embedding; reject texts exceeding model context.

antipattern.symptom: Cosine search ranks short texts above more relevant longer ones.
antipattern.root-cause: Cosine on unnormalized vectors equals dot product, which favours large-magnitude vectors.
antipattern.fix: Normalize on insert: `v / np.linalg.norm(v)`; skip vectors with norm < 1e-9.

antipattern.symptom: Bulk ingestion takes hours; API rate-limit alerts fire.
antipattern.root-cause: Per-text API call instead of batched.
